message:
feat(dashboard): add user avatar to header

Extract ProfilePicURL from Tailscale WhoIs response and display user
avatar in the dashboard header. Falls back to showing the first letter
of the username in a colored circle when no avatar is available.

- Add ProfilePicURL field to User struct
- Store full User object in context instead of just login string
- Add GetUserAvatar helper to extract avatar URL from context
- Update fleet.html, vm_detail.html, and layout.html templates

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 		"User":           GetUser(r.Context()),
+		"UserAvatar":     GetUserAvatar(r.Context()),
 		"ActiveNav":      "fleet",
 		"Tasks":          tasks,
 		"GroupedTasks":   groupedByRepo, // Keep for backward compatibility
